text: Machine learning is a subset of AI that enables systems to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.
PyTorch is a deep learning framework developed by Facebook AI Research, popular for research and production.
Transformers use self-attention mechanisms to process sequential data in parallel, enabling models like BERT and GPT.
RAG stands for Retrieval-Augmented Generation — it combines a retrieval step with a generative language model.
Scikit-learn provides consistent APIs for classification, regression, clustering, and preprocessing.
Sentence transformers create dense vector embeddings of text using pre-trained transformer models.
Neural networks learn hierarchical representations from data through layers of weighted connections.
Gradient descent is an iterative optimisation algorithm used to minimise a loss function in ML models.
Cross-entropy loss measures how different the predicted probability distribution is from the ground truth.
JPMorgan Chase uses AI for fraud detection, algorithmic trading, customer service, and credit risk assessment.
